prestazioni: Engine: CB-23 Turbo (1.3L inline-4, 12V SOHC) – Full forged internals with JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 1.5-bar boost reliability. Stock crankshaft retained with balanced flywheel (ACT Performance Clutch Stage 3+)

Turbocharger: Garrett GT2554R (54mm compressor, .63 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless downpipe (TurboSmart 40mm wastegate, TiAL MV-R blow-off valve) and front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-S, 600hp core)

Fuel System: Walbro 255lph in-tank pump, Nismo 550cc injectors (side-feed), and AEM F/IC-6 piggyback ECU with custom 3D-printed intake manifold (polished aluminum, equal-length runners) for optimized airflow to the CB-23 head
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny V1 Charade GT-ti (polyurethane front bumper, carbon fiber side skirts, and oversized rear diffuser with integrated dual 3-inch exhaust exits). Custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with gloss black roof and mirror caps

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30mm drop) with Cusco front strut bar and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm). Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for subframe and control arms

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +15 (front) and 15x9 +20 (rear) with Nitto NT01 195/50R15 (front) and 225/45R15 (rear). Custom 5x114.3 hub conversion (Daihatsu bolt pattern) with Kosei K1 Racing lug nuts
